name: pipeline
description: Thinking-widget (no integration). A live work queue: items flow queued → processing → done with a pop/drain/check animation. Drive it with update_surface{props:{items:[{label,sub?,status:'queued'|'active'|'done'}]}} to externalize a multi-item loop as it runs.

name: dossiers
description: Thinking-widget. A grid of scored entity cards (a score ring, stats, tags per card). For comparing/profiling a SET of things — candidates, repos, options. Drive with update_surface{props:{items:[{name,sub?,score?,stats?:[{k,n}],tags?}]}}.

name: timeline
description: Thinking-widget. A vertical timeline of events with a pulsing 'now' marker. For a SEQUENCE over time — a plan, a session log, what happened then what's next. Drive with update_surface{props:{items:[{time,title,detail?,now?}]}}.

name: matrix
description: Thinking-widget. A comparison matrix (options as rows × criteria as columns; cells render as yes/no dots, 0-3 heat pills, or text). For a DECISION or trade-off table. Drive with update_surface{props:{cols:[...],rows:[{name,cells:[true|false|0..3|'text']}]}}.

name: graph
description: Thinking-widget. A hub-and-spoke relationship graph (a center node with labelled spokes, animated edges). For RELATIONSHIPS around one thing — who connects to X, parts of a system. Drive with update_surface{props:{center:{label},nodes:[{label,sub?}]}}.

name: profile
description: Thinking-widget. An identity card for ONE subject — big name, up to 4 quiet stats (no titlebar, no prose). The centerpiece of a dossier/case-file board. Drive with update_surface{props:{kicker?,name,sub?,facts?:[{k,v}]}}.

name: rhythm
description: Thinking-widget. A week×hour activity punchcard (heat grid) + top time-sinks as bars. For WHEN something happens — work rhythm, usage, cadence. Drive with update_surface{props:{punch:{'<weekday0-6>:<hour0-23>':n},peakHours?:[h..],activeWeekdays?:[names],topApps?:[{app,secs?|n?}],note?}}.

name: toolbox
description: Thinking-widget. An inventory of chips in labelled sections — tools, tags, skills, ingredients, any flat sets; high-count items emphasize themselves. Drive with update_surface{props:{sections:[{label,items:[{name,n?}]}]}}.

name: quotes
description: Thinking-widget. Verbatim words displayed BIG (serif pull-quote card, shows the top 2-3) — for EXACTLY what someone said or wrote. Drive with update_surface{props:{items:[{text,source?}]}}.

name: workflows
description: Thinking-widget. The web tools someone lives in, as an ICON GRID (favicons, Shortcuts-widget look) — tap an icon to open the site as a live web surface via open_window. Drive with update_surface{props:{items:[{name,host,color?,integration?}]}}.

name: gaps
description: Thinking-widget. Open questions as a clean checklist — what is NOT known yet; flip an item with done:true when answered. Drive with update_surface{props:{items:[{q,hint?,done?}]}}.

name: discord-servers
description: Your Discord servers (guilds) as a live grid — icons, names, owner badge; click to open in Discord.

name: github-repos
description: Your most recently updated GitHub repositories — name, description, private/star badge; click to open.

name: remix
description: Remix the web — a control surface that lets the user redesign any website. The user opens a site and says what to change; YOU (the agent) do the work and render it back. The widget emits the user's intents as chat messages you receive via /events: `remix open <url>`, `remix instant <directive>` (fast ephemeral re-skin of the current page), `remix smart <directive>` (a DURABLE rule you build in the background — surgical or re-skin — that persists every visit), `remix act <ref>` (a click on a data-act element in the current view → open that link's page), `remix back`, `remix toggle|remove <id>`. To fulfill: fetch/extract the REAL page (open_window+read_window, or a public API), then push results into THIS widget with update_surface{props:{ view:'<styled HTML fragment using the .rmx design classes — .item/.av/.nm/.body/.acts/.article/.prose/.card, data-act on every clickable thing>', url, status, busy, remixes:[{id,name,enabled}] }}. NEVER invent data — render only what's really on the page. Spawn with spawn_widget{name:'remix'}.
